_description: Experiment-level constants. These do not change across any food or trial. Set once before Phase 1 begins and do not edit.
_target_carb_note: Determined during Phase 1 mass-finding calibration. Null until Phase 1 complete.
_reference_note: White bread is run simultaneously in every session as the normalization reference. Normalized AUC for white bread = 100 by definition.
_calibration_note: Re-run phase0_calibration.json + calibration.py if circuit is reassembled or strips change lot.
